key_drivers: Rising real yields (DFII10 +7bps to 2.08%) and strong USD (DXY 100.3) creating significant headwinds for risk assets and commodities
US-Israel war against Iran driving VIX to 31 and MOVE index to 112 - risk-off environment with elevated geopolitical premium in oil and gold
BoJ hawkish pivot and ECB hike bets rising vs Fed on hold creating rate divergence supportive of JPY and EUR vs USD

fallbacks_used: SOX: Used Nasdaq Global Index Watch (primary Yahoo Finance unavailable)
Gold ETF flows: Used most recent ainvest.com report showing $6.8B March inflows
